changes.short_title: Vast.ai cost for joint DSGC morphology + top-10 VGC DSI optimisation (t0022 base GABA_CONDUCTANCE_NULL_NS = 4.0 nS per t0037)

rationale: t0033's original plan implicitly assumed the t0022 default GABA_CONDUCTANCE_NULL_NS = 12 nS as the base optimisation parameter. Experimental evidence subsequently showed this pins the primary-DSI objective: t0030 (12 nS, DSI=1.000 pinned), t0036 (6 nS, DSI=1.000 still pinned), t0037 (ladder across {4, 2, 1, 0.5, 0} nS, sweet spot at 4 nS with DSI=0.429 and DSGC-like preferred direction 40.8 deg). Running the planned optimiser with 12 nS would sweep a flat DSI=1.000 landscape and waste compute. The effective answer is updated so consumers see the corrected base parameter (4 nS) in the title; details are preserved in the source tasks (t0037 sweep_results.csv and compare_literature.md). Closes suggestion S-0037-02.
